title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony leaves game in 2nd inning due to right wrist discomfort
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox Anthony was replaced by Masataka Yoshida in left field after appearing to hurt his wrist on a check swing.
Roman Anthony exited Monday's game in the second inning.
David Berding / Getty The hits keep on coming for the Red Sox.

title: Victims in fatal Lawrence crash both had gunshot wounds, DA says
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Crime One woman died on Friday, and a man died on Saturday evening, the DA said.
Two people who died after a car crash in Lawrence Thursday night were both suffering from gunshot wounds, the local district attorney said.
The crash occurred near 63 Erving Ave.

title: N.H. couple in their 70s froze to death in double suicide, AG says
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Local News Both of the couple's deaths were classified as suicides, and their cause of death was environmental hypothermia.
A married couple found dead near their New Hampshire summer home over the weekend died by suicide and froze to death, the state’s attorney general announced.
David Warren, 79, and Rae Lynn Warren, 78, of Tuftonboro were found outside by a neighbor on Saturday morning, the office of Attorney General John M.

title: It’s masks off in Newport on  ‘The Real Housewives of Rhode Island’

title: Custodial employee sues BC, alleging she faced racial and gender discrimination and was fired for speaking up
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Education Cassandra Williams, who is Black, says a fellow Boston College custodian told her that her desk was “in the back where she belongs.
” A view of the campus of Boston College in Chestnut Hill.

title: Minogue is ready to debate Healey, not primary opponent Shortsleeve
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Politics Mike Minogue says that it is time for the Mass.
GOP to "unite" to defeat Maura Healey.
Brian Shortsleeve says voters should see him and Minogue side-by-side again.

title: An underweight dog rescued in Dorchester receives care and looks for a foster home
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The Cane Corso mix, named Balboa, is returning to a healthier weight and will be available for adoption in two to four weeks.
An underweight stray dog was recently found and rescued in Dorchester.
The Cane Corso mix, now named Balboa, was rescued by Boston Animal Control April 22 and brought to the MSPCA-Angell Animal Medical Center.
